items.summary: Update the price formatting utility in frontend/src/lib/utils.ts to format all prices using the Indian Rupee symbol (₹) and Indian number formatting (e.g. ₹1,499 or ₹1,499.00). Replace any existing currency formatter (e.g. USD/$ format) with one that uses 'en-IN' locale and 'INR' currency, or equivalent manual formatting. This single change must cascade to every component that calls the price formatter.
